message:
You know that one friend who always panics at the slightest hiccup? Yup, that’s my buddy Dave. The other day, we were out for a walk with our dogs when a sudden thunderstorm rolled in. While I was calmly ushering my pup to a nearby tree for shelter, Dave was frantically searching for cover, practically dragging his dog along like it was a marathon! 

I couldn’t help but chuckle while also feeling a bit of sympathy for him. It reminded me how important it is to have a plan, even for those unexpected moments. A little preparation goes a long way, whether it’s a storm or just a day out with our furry friends. 

Have you ever had a moment where you wished you had prepped a bit more? This little refresher helped me think ahead!
